title: Eno Vanja: Kuvaus maalaiselämästä neljässä näytöksessä
summaries: "Eno Vanja: Kuvaus maalaiselämästä neljässä näytöksessä" by Anton Pavlovich Chekhov is a play first published in 1897. When an elderly professor and his captivating young wife visit a rural estate, they disrupt the lives of those who maintain it. Vanya, who has managed the property for years, and Astrov, a local doctor, both fall under the wife's spell. Meanwhile, the professor's daughter Sonya harbors unrequited feelings. Crisis erupts when the professor announces plans to sell the estate—Vanya and Sonya's home. (This is an automatically generated summary.)
